changes.value:
swissarmyhammer-merge/src/md.rs:43-95

`pub fn merge_md(base, ours, theirs, opts) -> Result<String, MergeError>`

8 tests cover clean merges, conflicts, and no-frontmatter cases. Missing:
- `MergeError::ParseFailure` when frontmatter contains invalid YAML
- One side has frontmatter, other sides don't (asymmetric frontmatter presence — partially covered by `ours_adds_frontmatter_to_plain_file` but not the theirs-adds case)
- Empty frontmatter on all sides merges cleanly (all fields removed yields None)
- JSONL changelog resolution through frontmatter (the opts.jsonl_path path is never exercised in md tests) #coverage-gap
Add tests for merge_md ParseFailure and edge cases
